requirements.text: Full-stack engineering experience with strong TypeScript and React proficiency
requirements.source_quote: Proven experience as a full stack engineer with strong proficiency in TypeScript and React

requirements.text: Product-oriented mindset and care for the why behind what is being built
requirements.source_quote: A product-oriented mindset - you care about the why behind what you're building, not just the how

requirements.text: Demonstrated ability to take features from concept to production independently
requirements.source_quote: Demonstrable experience taking features from concept to production independently

requirements.text: Meaningful use of AI tools such as Cursor, Copilot, or Claude in the engineering workflow
requirements.source_quote: Comfort using AI tools (e.g. Cursor, Copilot, Claude) as a genuine part of your engineering workflow - not just experimenting, but integrating them meaningfully

requirements.text: Strong communication and self-management in a small, high-trust team
requirements.source_quote: Strong communication skills and the ability to self-manage within a small, high-trust team

requirements.text: Experience working in a startup or early-stage environment
requirements.source_quote: Experience working in a startup or early-stage environment

requirements.text: Experience working in a B2B SaaS environment
requirements.source_quote: Experience working in a B2B SaaS environment

requirements.text: Enthusiasm for shaping how AI-augmented delivery teams work in practice
requirements.source_quote: Enthusiasm for helping shape how AI-augmented delivery teams actually work in practice

requirements.text: Partner directly with a Product Manager to shape, define, scope, and prioritise features
requirements.source_quote: Partnering closely with your Product Manager to define, scope, and prioritise features - bringing your own product thinking to the table

requirements.text: Own feature build-out end to end from architecture through production across frontend and backend
requirements.source_quote: Owning features end to end, from architecture decisions through to production, across the full stack

requirements.text: Write and maintain well-considered TypeScript across React frontend and backend services, with GraphQL APIs connecting the two
requirements.source_quote: Writing and maintaining clean, well-considered TypeScript across both frontend (React) and backend (NestJS), with GraphQL APIs connecting the two

requirements.text: Familiarity with NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, GraphQL, Apollo, or similar technologies
requirements.source_quote: Familiarity with our broader tech stack, including NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, GraphQL, Apollo, or similar technologies

requirements.text: Collaborate ad hoc with Staff Engineers, Engineering Managers, Designers, Data Science, QA, and DevOps
requirements.source_quote: Collaborating with subject matter experts - including a Staff Engineers, Engineering Managers, Designers, Data Science, QA, and DevOps

requirements.text: Contribute to a delivery culture that values speed, ownership, and continuous improvement over bureaucracy and hand-offs
requirements.source_quote: Contributing to a delivery culture that values speed, ownership, and continuous improvement over bureaucracy and hand-offs

requirements.text: Potential involvement in customer calls, discovery, solution shaping, and prioritisation
requirements.source_quote: You may be involved in customer calls, discovery, solution shaping and prioritisation

requirements.text: Build for end users with strong product intuition, technical judgement, and customer context
requirements.source_quote: This is a role for someone who genuinely lives and breathes building for end users

requirements.text: Interest in AI-native hiring, interview intelligence, skills assessments, and responsible human-controlled AI workflows

responsibilities.text: Partner with the PM to define, scope, and prioritise product features rather than simply executing tickets.
Own full-stack features from architecture and implementation through production release.
Use AI tooling in day-to-day engineering to move faster and operate effectively in a lean crew.
Collaborate with design, data science, QA, DevOps, and senior engineering experts when the work demands it.
Participate in customer discovery, solution shaping, and prioritisation to understand the full picture behind the work.

success_outcomes.text: Ship meaningful AI-native hiring platform features quickly in a compact AAD crew.
Improve talent-team and candidate workflows across Interview Intelligence, Skills Assessments, and AI Interview Agent experiences.
Make strong technical and product trade-offs without formal people-management overhead.
Contribute to Spotted Zebra's evolving AI-augmented delivery model through practical engineering habits and feedback.

keyword_signals.reason: Core must-have and repeated implementation language for frontend and backend.
Role owns frontend, backend, and production feature delivery.
The role sits in a PM-plus-product-engineers AAD crew and values product intuition.
Must-have asks for meaningful use of Cursor, Copilot, Claude, or similar tools.
Backend/API connector in key responsibilities and nice-to-have stack.
Named backend framework in the target stack.
Named GraphQL ecosystem technology in the target stack.

screening_priorities.reason: The role's first screen is likely strong TypeScript/React full-stack experience tied to production feature delivery.
screening_priorities.evidence: Proven experience as a full stack engineer with strong proficiency in TypeScript and React

screening_priorities.reason: The role is a product-engineering IC role, so independent concept-to-production ownership and product judgement are central.
screening_priorities.evidence: taking features from concept to production independently

screening_priorities.reason: Spotted Zebra is explicitly building an AI-native company and asks for genuine integration of AI tools in engineering work.
Operating context matters: startup/early-stage, B2B SaaS, high-trust lean teams, and direct PM collaboration are all explicit.
screening_priorities.evidence: Experience working in a startup or early-stage environment

screening_priorities.reason: Nice-to-have stack and HR tech are differentiators after core fit is established.
screening_priorities.evidence: Familiarity with our broader tech stack

candidate_risk_notes.text: A candidate without clear independent full-stack feature ownership may be screened out because the role often expects largely solo ownership from architecture to production.
candidate_risk_notes.source_quote: you'll often own the build-out of a feature largely solo, taking it from architecture through to production

candidate_risk_notes.text: A candidate who only experiments with AI tools, rather than using them as part of daily engineering delivery, may be a weaker match.
candidate_risk_notes.source_quote: not just experimenting, but integrating them meaningfully

candidate_risk_notes.text: Location and work authorization constraints are not stated beyond remote-first, so non-UK or non-local applicants may need confirmation before applying.

red_flags.text: No salary or compensation range is disclosed.
No specific country, time-zone, visa, or work-authorization constraints are stated, despite the company being UK-based and remote-first.
